appbar-title: font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink); flex: 1; letter-spacing: -0.2px;
day-banner: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 14px 16px 8px; gap: 16px;
day-label: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--secondary); letter-spacing: 0.6px; text-transform: uppercase;
day-weather: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-left: auto;
day-temp: font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
event-time: font-size: 12px; color: var(--secondary); margin-top: 2px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
event-location: font-size: 12px; color: var(--secondary); margin-top: 2px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
event-meet: background: var(--blue-tint); border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--blue); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-top: 6px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
